item.title: Small Shop Upgrades for Blacksmithing
item.description: A few small upgrades can change how the whole shop feels in blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Small Shop Upgrades for Blacksmithing
media:content.media:description: A few small upgrades can change how the whole shop feels in blacksmithing and metalworking.

item.title: Forging a Spoon
item.description: A calm look at forging a spoon by hand, focusing on shaping metal with heat, hammer control, and traditional shop skill.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Spoon
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging a spoon by hand, focusing on shaping metal with heat, hammer control, and traditional shop skill.

item.title: Small Shop Work That Lasts for Years
item.description: Small shop work, but the kind that gets used for years. A simple forged piece made for everyday use and lasting value.

media:content.media:title: Small Shop Work That Lasts for Years
media:content.media:description: Small shop work, but the kind that gets used for years. A simple forged piece made for everyday use and lasting value.

item.title: A Small Forged Detail Finishes the Piece
item.description: A small forged detail can make a project feel finished.

media:content.media:title: A Small Forged Detail Finishes the Piece
media:content.media:description: A small forged detail can make a project feel finished.

item.title: Blacksmithing 101: Forge Welding Basics
item.description: A calm introduction to forge welding in blacksmithing, focused on the first essential concept and traditional shop technique.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing 101: Forge Welding Basics
media:content.media:description: A calm introduction to forge welding in blacksmithing, focused on the first essential concept and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Quick Shop Test for Simple Stakes
item.description: A quick shop test shows whether simple stakes are worth the effort in the shop.

media:content.media:description: A quick shop test shows whether simple stakes are worth the effort in the shop.

item.title: Axe Forged From Steel Cable
item.description: A calm look at forging an axe from steel cable, highlighting shaping, heat, and traditional metalworking technique.

media:content.media:title: Axe Forged From Steel Cable
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging an axe from steel cable, highlighting shaping, heat, and traditional metalworking technique.

item.title: Forged Hook With Shelf for Everyday Carry
item.description: A handmade forged hook with a top shelf for keys, wallets, and more. A practical shop project focused on shaping, fit, and clean metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forged Hook With Shelf for Everyday Carry
media:content.media:description: A handmade forged hook with a top shelf for keys, wallets, and more. A practical shop project focused on shaping, fit, and clean metalwork.

item.title: Plain Bar to a Handy Shop Tool
item.description: See how a plain bar turns into a shop tool you’d actually use.

media:content.media:title: Plain Bar to a Handy Shop Tool
media:content.media:description: See how a plain bar turns into a shop tool you’d actually use.

item.title: A Simple Forge Project for the Shop
item.description: A simple forge project that solves a real shop problem, showing practical blacksmithing and metalworking craft.

media:content.media:description: A simple forge project that solves a real shop problem, showing practical blacksmithing and metalworking craft.

item.title: The Power of the Forge
item.description: A calm look at the forge and the craft of shaping metal with heat, skill, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: A Small Forge Project with Big Results
item.description: A small forge project that ends up doing a lot more than expected.
